title: Redstone Repulse
description: Adds a glove that allows for parrying.
body: # Mod Info This mod adds the Repulse Glove, a glove that allows the user to parry projectiles. It can be upgraded with an Iron, Gold, and Diamond Block. The more upgraded your glove is, the more kinds of projectiles you can parry and the more range you get. Although, you need at least one iron block to make your glove functionable. Repel Gloves are similar to Repulse Gloves, the difference is that Repel flings projectiles up only. ## External Mod Support To make your projectiles support being parryable with this mod, just make sure the projectile entity has the tags below. **Iron**: forge:iron_projecticle_entity **Gold**: forge:gold_projecticle_entity **Diamond**: minecraft:impact_projectiles ### Thanks Hakita! Inspired by **Ultrakill**'s parrying system, the gamerule **Ultrapill** is added as a small tribute. **Made with MCreator.**
